summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be substantially implemented. The frontend AdminLoginForm no longer validates against hardcoded admin credentials and calls onSuccess for any non-empty username/password. The AdminDashboard uses a session-based login gate with no admin role check. On the backend, getAllFeedback and getPendingFeedback are now accessible to any authenticated user (not just admin), and the same pattern appears to apply to appointments. All existing submission flows are preserved.
